description_long: This is a modern bungalow set amidst a rocky landscape with lush vegetation and flowering plants. The structure features clean, angular lines and large glass windows, with a flat roof and multiple outdoor terraces. The main entrance is accessible via a stone pathway, and there is a covered carport with space for two vehicles. The building is surrounded by prominent white-gray boulders and landscaped greenery, creating a striking contrast with the minimalist architecture. A cylindrical water tank and other utility elements are visible near the carport, indicating practical amenities. The overall design emphasizes openness, integration with nature, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, surrounded by rocky landscaping and lush plants, featuring a carport and multiple terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport with two vehicles, stone pathway, and prominent glass facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rocky landscape, flowering plants, and partial view of the building's upper terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view with large boulders, lush vegetation, and a glimpse of the building's back terrace and glass windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear of the bungalow, carport, water tank, and more of the rocky terrain.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
